title: senecio helenitis subsp. arvernensis
intro: Senecio helenitis subsp. arvernensis, also known as the Pyrenean ragwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pyrenean ragwort include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Senecio helenitis subsp. arvernensis can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
